title: P07 Release, Approval, And Change Management — Complete
exit_criteria_met: LiveAttachManifest carries ladder_state, broker_server, and bundle_id — no live/demo attachment can occur without a declared ladder state.
validate_attach_against_bundle checks inputs_hash between bundle and manifest; mismatch automatically opens a release_integrity_failure S1 incident.
IncidentClosurePacket carries deployed_bundle_id and ladder_state_at_incident for audit trail.
DeploymentLadderState type defined with all five states.
RELEASE_AND_ROLLBACK.md runbook references deployment ladder, bundle contracts, and environment reproducibility.
code_changes: src/agentic_forex/goblin/models.py: added DeploymentLadderState; updated LiveAttachManifest with ladder_state/broker_server/bundle_id; updated IncidentClosurePacket with deployed_bundle_id/ladder_state_at_incident
src/agentic_forex/goblin/controls.py: added validate_attach_against_bundle with hash-check enforcement and auto S1 incident on mismatch
notes: P07 outputs (ladder state, bundle identity) are referenced in P06 incident closure packets — P07 was implemented before P06 enforcement was added, as the ROADMAP recommends.
